mapper.select: SELECT n.id AS id, s.code AS siteCode, s.name AS siteName, n.title AS title, n.author AS author, n.category AS category, n.cover_url AS coverUrl, n.novel_url AS novelUrl, n.word_count AS wordCount, n.status AS status, -- IFNULL 保证 NULL 字段也返回 key(空字符串),前端无需可选链 IFNULL(n.description, '') AS description, IFNULL(n.tags, '') AS tags, IFNULL(n.outline, '') AS outline, IFNULL(n.characters, '') AS characters, n.first_seen AS firstSeen, n.last_crawl_time AS lastCrawlTime FROM novel n JOIN site s ON n.site_id = s.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
